word: H4360 - מִכְלֻל - miklul - mik-lool' - All sorts

sections.paragraph:
Original: מכלל

Transliteration: miklûl

Phonetic: mik-lool'

BDB Definition:

  1. a thing made perfect, perfect thing, gorgeous garment or stuff
  2. (TWOT) all sorts of things

Origin: from H3634

TWOT entry: 985d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
